about.label: Who We Are
about.title:
Built for Those
Who Push Limits
about.heading:
Premium Supplements,
No Compromises
about.p1: Prime Performance Group is a premium supplement brand based in Bangkok, Thailand. We combine Western formulation standards with local accessibility, delivering products that serious athletes, fitness enthusiasts, and health-conscious individuals can trust.
about.p2: Every product is third-party tested, transparently labeled, and designed to deliver measurable results. No proprietary blends. No fillers. Just science and performance.
about.p3: We believe the supplement industry in Southeast Asia needed a shake-up. Too many under-dosed, poorly labeled products. Athletes and fitness enthusiasts deserved better — and that's exactly what we set out to build.
about.missionDesc: To bring world-class, transparently formulated supplements to Thailand — making premium performance nutrition accessible to every athlete and fitness enthusiast in the region.
about.visionDesc: To become Southeast Asia's most trusted performance supplement brand — known for integrity, efficacy, and an uncompromising commitment to quality over marketing.
about.valuesDesc: Transparency in every label. Integrity in every dose. Community in every interaction. We don't hide behind proprietary blends — we show you exactly what you're putting in your body.
about.teamSubtitle: Athletes, scientists, and entrepreneurs united by a shared commitment to raising the bar on supplement quality in Thailand.
about.ctaSubtitle: Browse our full lineup of science-backed supplements, designed for serious performance.
story.label: Our Story
story.title: From Vision to Reality
story.subtitle: How a passion for performance and a gap in the Thai supplement market sparked a brand built on integrity.
story.quote: "We didn't start Prime Performance Group because we wanted to sell supplements. We started it because we were tired of buying bad ones."
story.ch1p1: We noticed that Thailand's supplement market was flooded with under-dosed, poorly labeled products. Athletes and fitness enthusiasts deserved better — Western-grade quality without the import markups.
story.ch1p2: Walking through supplement stores in Bangkok, the pattern was clear: flashy packaging, proprietary blends hiding minimal dosages, and prices inflated by unnecessary middlemen. Something had to change.
story.ch2p1: We partnered with world-class formulators and invested in clinical-dose research. Every ingredient is chosen for its evidence base, not its marketing appeal.
story.ch2p2: Months of research. Hundreds of formulation iterations. We studied every peer-reviewed paper we could find and consulted with sports nutritionists, exercise physiologists, and competitive athletes.
story.ch3p1: Prime Performance Group launched with a core lineup of pre-workouts, protein, and recovery formulas — and the response from the Thai fitness community was immediate.
story.ch3p2: Our first batch sold out in 72 hours. Not because of hype marketing, but because athletes could finally read the label and see real doses. Word spread fast.
story.ch4p1: Now serving athletes across Thailand with an expanding product line and a growing community. This is just the beginning.
story.ch4p2: With over 200 gym partnerships, 50+ athletes in our ambassador program, and a product line that keeps growing — PPG is becoming the gold standard for supplements in Thailand. And we're only getting started.
story.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of athletes and fitness enthusiasts who've made the switch to PPG.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Questions about our products, wholesale inquiries, or partnership opportunities? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Whether you're a customer with a question, a gym looking for wholesale pricing, or an athlete interested in partnership — we respond to every message.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.faq1q: Do you ship nationwide in Thailand?
contact.faq1a: Yes! We offer next-day delivery in Bangkok and 2-3 day shipping to all provinces in Thailand. Free shipping on orders over ฿2,000.
contact.faq2q: Are your products FDA Thailand approved?
contact.faq2a: All Prime Performance Group products are registered with the Thai FDA and manufactured in GMP-certified facilities.
contact.faq3q: What makes PPG different from other supplement brands?
contact.faq3a: We use clinically dosed formulations with full label transparency — no proprietary blends. Every batch is third-party tested. We bring Western formulation standards to the Thai market at accessible prices.
contact.faq4q: Do you offer wholesale or gym partnership pricing?
contact.faq4a: Absolutely. We partner with gyms, studios, and retailers across Thailand. Use the contact form above or email wholesale@primeperformancegroup.com for pricing details.
contact.faq5q: Can I return products if I'm not satisfied?
contact.faq5a: We offer a 30-day satisfaction guarantee on all products. If you're not happy, contact our support team and we'll make it right — no questions asked.
contact.faq6q: What payment methods do you accept?
contact.faq6a: We accept credit/debit cards, bank transfer, PromptPay, and cash on delivery (Bangkok only). All transactions are secured with SSL encryption.
